commit.message:
Fix camera vision: correct data_received callback signature

The Python livekit SDK passes a single DataPacket object to
data_received handlers, not (data, participant, kind, topic).
Wrong signature caused the handler to silently fail, so the
agent never received camera frames.

Also add frame size cap and logging on the frontend.

commit.message:
fix: complete 2.7 revert by moving static assets back to lib/assets

The Metalsmith 2.7 revert (e6d6685) restored metalsmith.js and
package.json but left static assets in src/assets/ where the 2.7
statik() method expected them. Since the build now uses
metalsmith-static-files (which copies from lib/assets/), the assets
in src/assets/ were processed through the full Metalsmith pipeline
instead of being simply copied. This caused a phantom "assets" menu
item that returned a 404.

Changes:
- Move static assets (images, audio, icons, lotties, awards) from
  src/assets/ back to lib/assets/
- Remove src/assets/ directory entirely
- Fix asset handling test to use metalsmith-static-files instead of
  the 2.7 statik() method
- Document the revert and incomplete cleanup in MIGRATION-MS2.7.md
  with a checklist for the next migration attempt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix onboarding friction and pod self-pause

- Pod pauses (not terminates) after research loop via RunPod GraphQL API
- Propagate RUNPOD_API_KEY and RUNPOD_POD_ID to pod .bash_profile
- Make ssh_key configurable in defaults/user config
- Add .gitignore for .DS_Store and __pycache__
- Consolidate .env guidance in setup wizard
- Fix README: mention all dep file formats, terminate→pause
- Fix existing test and add config tests

commit.message:
fix(interactive): sequence window-size refresh before pending startup work

Wrap the initial window-size command and any queued pending command in a
bubbletea::sequence() so the terminal dimensions are guaranteed to be
resolved before startup work (e.g. RunPending) begins executing. Previously
both were batched in parallel via batch(), which meant pending work could
race ahead of the window-size measurement, causing layout calculations
to use stale or zero dimensions.

- Extract startup_init_cmd() to encapsulate the sequencing logic
- Use sequence([window_size_cmd, pending_cmd]) instead of batch()
- Wrap the sequence itself in batch() with the input_cmd so keyboard
  input setup still runs concurrently
- Add test verifying the sequence order: WindowSizeMsg first, then
  RunPending

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: pass route context to NextAuth handler in POST wrapper

The rate-limiting wrapper was only forwarding `req` but not the
route context containing `params.nextauth`, causing NextAuth to
crash with "Cannot destructure property 'nextauth' of 'e.query'".

Compute profile stats and badges live for all users

games played, podium placements, and first-place counts instead of

fix(autopilot): strip all Claude Code env vars by prefix match

Instead of deleting specific env vars (CLAUDECODE, CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT),

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Implement Appointment Prep Steps 3-5 - Prioritize, Scenarios, Generate

Complete implementation of the Appointment Prep Flow for Steps 3-5:

Step 3: Prioritize Concerns
- PUT /api/appointment-prep/{appointment_id}/prioritize endpoint
- Saves ranked user concerns to database
- Pydantic validation for non-empty lists

Step 4: Generate Scenarios
- POST /api/appointment-prep/{appointment_id}/scenarios endpoint
- Context-aware scenario selection (5-7 scenarios based on appointment goal + dismissal experience)
- LLM-generated suggestions for each dismissal scenario
- Returns JSON array of ScenarioCard objects with suggestions, titles, situations, categories

Step 5: Generate Outputs
- POST /api/appointment-prep/{appointment_id}/generate endpoint
- Generates provider summary and personal cheat sheet using LLM
- Converts markdown to PDF using reportlab
- Uploads PDFs to Supabase Storage
- Returns public URLs for both documents

New Files:
- backend/app/services/storage.py: StorageService for Supabase Storage uploads
- backend/migrations/add_appointment_scenarios_column.sql: DB schema updates (concerns, scenarios columns + GIN index)
- backend/tests/api/routes/test_appointment_steps_3_4_5.py: 4 foundational tests

Modified Files:
- backend/app/models/appointment.py: 5 new response/request models
- backend/app/repositories/appointment_repository.py: save_concerns() and save_scenarios() methods
- backend/app/services/llm.py: generate_scenario_suggestions() and generate_pdf_content() methods
- backend/app/api/routes/appointment.py: 3 new endpoints + 3 helper functions
- backend/app/api/dependencies.py: get_storage_service() dependency injection

Architecture:
- Follows V2 patterns (repositories, dependency injection, Pydantic validation)
- Context-aware LLM prompts (appointment type, goal, age, journey stage)
- Type-safe throughout with proper error handling
- Comprehensive logging at all operation points

Test Results:
- 21/21 tests passing (17 existing + 4 new)
- No regressions
- All imports successful

claude_code_version field not present in working plugins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: disable express-rate-limit IPv6 validation to resolve backend 404

express-rate-limit v8 throws ValidationError when custom keyGenerator
uses req.ip without ipKeyGenerator helper. This breaks the middleware
chain on Zeabur (IPv6 network), causing all API endpoints to return 404.

Since userId is the primary rate-limit key and IP is only a fallback,
disable keyGeneratorIpFallback validation.

Also updates CLAUDE.md with store patterns, import aliases, single-test
commands, and additional backend conventions.

Code review fixes (Phase 7):
- hook.rs: rewrite glob matching — * no longer crosses / boundaries
- lesson.rs: use resolve_lesson for type safety in show command
- lesson list: SQL-level filtering via json_extract (no in-memory filter)
- audit.rs: add dirty tree guard, fix orphan branch workflow
- config.rs: add env var override for cleanup_interval_secs
- store.rs: negate FTS5 BM25 rank for correct display ordering
- connection.rs: wire list_lessons with pattern filter

New features:
- seed: add --file (single path) and --files (batch paths file)
- README: document lessons, search, config, watch, analytics, hooks, seed, audit

Planning:
- .plan/agent-hardening.md: Symphony-inspired dispatch improvements
